title: Machine Listening for Wildlife and Machine Faults

pages.title: An Alert Needs Evidence
pages.kicker: A sound score becomes useful only when operators can inspect its source and uncertainty.

cards.title: Time window
cards.body: Preserve onset, offset, recurrence, and neighboring context.

cards.title: Sensor provenance
cards.body: Record device, location, channel, conditions, and model version.

cards.title: Confidence
cards.body: Calibrate known, ambiguous, and novel events separately.

cards.title: Review path
cards.body: Experts need the exact audio excerpt behind each claim.
